description: Slack-originated feature and use-case intake for Port and Cursor.
title: Slack Use Case Intake

widgets.markdown: Slack messages that are approved for intake should be converted into `slack_use_case` entities. Triage each entity until it has a summary, acceptance criteria, target repository URL, and Cursor prompt. Once its status is `ready_for_cursor`, it is ready for a Cursor workflow/action to implement the use case in the correct demo-monorepo.
widgets.title: How this intake works
